name: Orb of Terror
description: Notes A reskinned version of the Orb of Conflict, previously obtainable by exchanging 50 Pumpkin Tokens and 25 Bone Tokens (Halloween 2018) or 100 Bone Sigils (Halloween 2019).
effects: On enemies: Stasis Stasis Radius: 3 tiles Stasis Duration: 7 seconds On self: Speedy and Damaging Speedy & Damaging Duration: 2 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) seconds
